<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="-33.59" y="3220" width="1540" height="970" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="Table parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="189.00495532087734" y="3260" width="1094.8052315190903" height="176.69291338582678" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Time Series Panel" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;container=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> Per-column cell type" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="238.66384240454914" y="3313.1233595800527" width="241.36528838342812" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="Gauge cells
cpu, memory, disk" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="537.7720227457352" y="3313.1233595800527" width="220.57784727863526" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="Colored text
status column" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="816.0927619821284" y="3313.1233595800527" width="184.77725426482536" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="Value Mappings
on status_code" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1057.4580503655566" y="3313.1233595800527" width="195.17097481722178" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="Field Overrides

Table with values" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="343.7559057676686" y="3547.5590551181103" width="212.49384240454916" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="Tooltip
All series mode" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="613.9926401299756" y="3547.5590551181103" width="195.17097481722178" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" value="Axis
Label, scale, soft min" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="866.9065069049553" y="3547.5590551181103" width="248.2944354183591" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="Standard Options
Unit, decimals, color" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1172.9438342810724" y="3547.5590551181103" width="242.5201462225833" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" value="Thresholds" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="429.2153858651503" y="3795.8530183727034" width="158.2155239642567" height="62.36220472440945" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" value="Value Mappings
Value type" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="645.1738017871651" y="3781.994750656168" width="195.17097481722178" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" value="Color Mode
Background" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="898.0876685621447" y="3781.994750656168" width="165.14467099918767" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="19" value="Thresholds" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="408.4279447603575" y="4030.288713910761" width="158.2155239642567" height="62.36220472440945" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="20" value="Value Mappings
Range type" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="624.3863606823722" y="4016.4304461942256" width="195.17097481722178" height="90.07874015748033" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="21" value="Unit / Min / Max" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="877.3002274573519" y="4030.288713910761" width="206.71955320877336" height="62.36220472440945" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
